prompt: 데이터 분석 분야의 암묵지를 추출해주세요 (orient file present)

assertions.name: template-structure-intact
assertions.description: Output contains all fixed template sections: [Context], [Task], [Output Constraint], and 4 axes

assertions.name: orient-context-used
assertions.description: DOMAIN and GOAL descriptions are enriched using information from the orient file (sub-areas, priority areas) rather than being generic

assertions.name: has-scope-section
assertions.description: If orient has priority areas, a [Scope] section should be present focusing extraction on priority areas

assertions.name: depth-over-volume
assertions.description: Output Constraint says 'Depth Over Volume' NOT 'Absolute Maximum' — key improvement from v0.1

assertions.name: output-in-english
assertions.description: Final prompt file is in English regardless of conversation language
